title: Petface (Seriously Strong by Petface) Dog Toy Rubber Extreme Tugger Chew Toy
features: TOUGH TOY: The Seriously Strong Rubber Extreme Tugger chew toy is perfect for dogs with strong jaws and playful instincts
DURABLE DESIGN: Made of heavy-duty rubber for ultimate strength; keeps pets fit, healthy and entertained
HEAVY DUTY: Encourages playfulness while helping maintain dental hygiene and preventing gum disease in dogs
LONG-LASTING FUN: This chew toy is designed to be long-lasting, providing hours of entertainment for your furry friend

TOY SAFETY: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘chew’ damage, please supervise your pet with this toy, examine regularly for wear, and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer Petface - your pets best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Shop for your favourite dog, cats and wild bird products for great value! PETFACE SERIOUSLY STRONG The Petface seriously strong range is carefully designed for the toughest of chewers. Plush toys are extra durable and squeakers are designed to continue working even when punctured! They are also double seamed to ensure for ultimate strength. Encourage playfulness and fun with your pup, keep them entertained for hours! Rubber toys also promote dental health, keeping your dog fit and healthy. All Toys are fit for both indoor and outdoor use, for fun everywhere. It helps to keep teeth and gums clean by flossing which helps prevent gum disease and plaque build-up. The Petface Seriously Strong Plush Tiger Dog Toy is built to withstand even the strongest of chewers. We recommend that you regularly examine this item for excessive wear and tear and replace it if any damage could represent a health hazard. With its bright and attractive design, this toy is sure to be a long-lasting favourite, offering hours of fun that your dog will never tire of.
